explanatoryNotes: Public matching funds account for about 56% of the campaign's total resources.
Private fundraising looks relatively diffuse: the top ten donors account for only 8% of reported private contributions.
46 donors gave at the legal maximum, totaling $48,300.
A noticeable share of reported private fundraising, 26%, came from outside New York City.
Among reported private contributions, real estate stands out as one of the strongest donor patterns.
